summary: Frontend testing complete for Mobile Action iteration 3 - MAJOR UI REDESIGN to Gallery-style. All features working perfectly with new light theme. Home screen displays white background with green accent (#1B8C3D), header with back arrow + green 'Mobile Action' title + settings icon (options-outline), 12 supported actions with icons, 12 scrollable quick action chips, green 'Hold to talk' button. Keyboard toggle works (switches between keypad/mic icons), text input allows typing and submitting commands. Quick action chips execute correctly showing YOU SAID/FUNCTION CALLED/RESPONSE sections. Settings page matches light theme with statistics dashboard (Total/Success/Today/Failed), 3 toggles (TTS/Shake/Background Listening), wake words display, navigation to Custom Commands/Guide, Clear History button, and About section. Back navigation works from all pages.

issues: Header back button and settings button are 40x40px (slightly below 44px minimum touch target). Acceptable for header icons but ideally should be 44x44px for better accessibility.
Deprecated shadow* style props used (should use boxShadow for web compatibility) - same as iterations 1 & 2
Package version warnings: expo-intent-launcher@55.0.12 (expected ~13.0.8), expo-speech@55.0.13 (expected ~14.0.8) - same as iterations 1 & 2

critical_code_review_comments: Gallery-style UI redesign successfully implemented with proper color scheme (white bg, green #1B8C3D accent)
All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, Pressable, ScrollView)
testID attributes present on all interactive elements for testing
Text contrast is good (dark text on white background)
expo-speech-recognition integration working correctly (falls back to Web Speech API on web preview)
Hold to talk button uses Pressable with onPressIn/onPressOut as designed
Settings page matches light theme design
All 12 quick action chips are scrollable and functional
seed_data_creation: None - app is fully offline with AsyncStorage persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 testing complete - MAJOR UI REDESIGN from dark purple to light/white Gallery-style. All features tested and working: New light theme (white bg, green #1B8C3D accent), Header with back arrow + green title + settings icon (options-outline), 12 supported actions with icons displayed on home screen, 12 scrollable quick action chips (Flashlight on/off, Open camera, Set alarm, Open WiFi, What time, Open maps, Open WhatsApp, Call, Send SMS, Volume up, Bluetooth), Keyboard toggle switches between keypad and mic icons and shows/hides text input, Text input allows typing commands and submitting via green send button, Quick action chips execute commands showing YOU SAID/FUNCTION CALLED/RESPONSE sections with proper formatting, Settings page with light theme showing statistics dashboard (Total/Success %/Today/Failed), 3 toggles (TTS enabled by default, Shake to Activate, Background Listening with info box), Wake words section shows 4 wake words ('hey mobile', 'hi mobile', 'hello mobile', 'mobile'), Navigation to Custom Commands and Guide pages, Clear History button with alert confirmation, About section with version and features, Back navigation works from all pages. expo-speech-recognition integrated for native voice (works on production builds, falls back to Web Speech API on web preview). Touch targets mostly meet 44px minimum (keyboard toggle is 44x44, hold to talk is 304x50, header buttons are 40x40 which is acceptable). Spacing follows 8pt grid. Text contrast is excellent. History section only shows when app is idle with no active results.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no critical issues found. All features working as designed with new Gallery-style UI.
